title: HoboKraft
description: Light weight modpack that adds RPG like gameplay, exploration, new bosses, new dungeons, create technology for automation and transportation, spectrum for magic fun, and farmers delight for those who like slow living.
body: Automate your life with create, fight new bosses and mutant mobs with RPG weapons, explore the hidden power of the geodes, map the heavens, explore the mines, and build your dream farm. Do whatever you like in this lightweight kitchen sink mod!
